source_rationale: RGS5 is a pericyte/perivascular marker highly expressed in DDX4 AB+ cells, suggesting a perivascular identity for this sorted population
ACTA2 (alpha smooth muscle actin) is a canonical marker of smooth muscle/perivascular cells enriched in this population
TAGLN (transgelin) is a smooth muscle marker gene characteristic of perivascular/mural cells
NOTCH3 is a key pericyte/vascular smooth muscle cell receptor involved in mural cell identity
PDGFRB is a canonical pericyte marker essential for perivascular cell recruitment and signaling
MYH11 (smooth muscle myosin heavy chain) is a definitive smooth muscle cell marker
PLN (phospholamban) is expressed in smooth muscle/perivascular cells regulating calcium handling
MCAM (CD146) is a well-established pericyte surface marker used for perivascular cell identification
DCN (decorin) is a hallmark extracellular matrix proteoglycan produced by ovarian stromal/fibroblast cells
PDGFRA is a canonical fibroblast/stromal cell marker widely used to identify mesenchymal stromal populations
COL1A1 encodes type I collagen, a major extracellular matrix component produced by stromal fibroblasts
SERPINE2 is a serine protease inhibitor enriched in ovarian stromal cells involved in tissue remodeling
MDK (midkine) is a growth factor highly expressed in ovarian stromal cells supporting folliculogenesis
STAR (steroidogenic acute regulatory protein) is essential for steroidogenesis in ovarian theca/stromal cells
ARX is a transcription factor expressed in ovarian somatic/stromal cells involved in gonadal development
CLDN11 is a tight junction protein characteristic of ovarian stromal cells
TCF21 is a transcription factor marking ovarian stromal/interstitial cells
VWF (von Willebrand factor) is a canonical endothelial cell marker involved in hemostasis
CLDN5 (claudin-5) is a tight junction protein specific to endothelial cells
CDH5 (VE-cadherin) is the definitive endothelial adherens junction protein and lineage marker
CD34 is a sialomucin expressed on vascular endothelial cells used as a canonical endothelial marker
KDR (VEGFR2) is the primary VEGF receptor on endothelial cells essential for angiogenesis
EMCN (endomucin) is a sialomucin specifically expressed on vascular endothelial cells
ERG is an ETS transcription factor essential for endothelial cell identity and vascular development
FLT1 (VEGFR1) is a VEGF receptor specifically expressed on endothelial cells
EGFL7 is an endothelial-specific secreted factor critical for vascular tube formation
PTPRB (VE-PTP) is an endothelial-specific receptor phosphatase regulating vascular permeability
AMH (anti-Müllerian hormone) is a canonical granulosa cell marker produced by growing follicles
FOXL2 is the master transcription factor for granulosa cell identity and ovarian differentiation
INHA (inhibin alpha) is produced by granulosa cells and is a key marker of ovarian follicular function
FST (follistatin) is highly expressed in granulosa cells where it modulates activin signaling
HSD17B1 is a steroidogenic enzyme in granulosa cells converting estrone to estradiol
AMHR2 (AMH receptor type 2) is specifically expressed on granulosa cells mediating AMH signaling
WNT6 is a Wnt ligand enriched in granulosa cells involved in follicular development signaling
KRT18 is an epithelial cytokeratin characteristic of granulosa cells reflecting their epithelial nature
TNNI3 is highly upregulated in granulosa cells and serves as a distinguishing marker in ovarian tissue
PTGDS (prostaglandin D2 synthase) is highly expressed in granulosa cells involved in follicular prostaglandin metabolism
WT1 is a transcription factor expressed in granulosa cells essential for ovarian follicle development
TYROBP (DAP12) is an immune cell adaptor protein broadly expressed in myeloid and NK cells
CD69 is an early activation marker on immune cells including T cells and NK cells
PTPRC (CD45) is the pan-leukocyte marker expressed on all immune cells
AIF1 (IBA1) is a calcium-binding protein expressed in macrophages and microglia, marking myeloid immune cells
FCER1G is an Fc receptor gamma chain expressed on myeloid and NK immune cells
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine produced by T cells and NK cells marking adaptive immune populations
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein expressed in NK cells and cytotoxic T lymphocytes
CD52 is a GPI-anchored glycoprotein broadly expressed on lymphocytes and monocytes
CORO1A is an actin-binding protein essential for T cell survival and broadly expressed in leukocytes
LYZ (lysozyme) is a canonical myeloid cell marker involved in innate antimicrobial defense
CD14 is the canonical monocyte surface marker and LPS co-receptor
CD163 is a scavenger receptor highly expressed on monocytes/macrophages, marking tissue-resident populations
C1QA is a complement component highly expressed by monocytes/macrophages in tissue
LYZ (lysozyme) is a canonical monocyte/macrophage marker involved in antimicrobial defense
CSF1R (CD115) is the M-CSF receptor essential for monocyte/macrophage differentiation and survival
FCGR2A (CD32) is an Fc gamma receptor highly expressed on monocytes mediating phagocytosis
MS4A6A is a membrane-spanning protein enriched in monocytes/macrophages
CTSS (cathepsin S) is a cysteine protease highly expressed in monocytes involved in antigen presentation
FOLR2 is a folate receptor marking tissue-resident macrophages/monocytes
AIF1 (IBA1) is a macrophage/monocyte marker involved in inflammatory signaling
LYVE1 marks tissue-resident macrophages associated with lymphatic vasculature
FGL2 (fibrinogen-like 2) is highly expressed in monocytes/macrophages with immunomodulatory function
ZP3 (zona pellucida glycoprotein 3) is an oocyte-specific structural protein of the zona pellucida
FIGLA is an oocyte-specific transcription factor essential for folliculogenesis and oocyte gene expression
DDX4 (VASA) is the canonical germ cell marker RNA helicase essential for germ cell development
DAZL is an RNA-binding protein essential for germ cell development and meiosis
SYCP3 is a synaptonemal complex protein marking meiotic germ cells/oocytes
NLRP5 is an oocyte-specific inflammasome component essential for preimplantation development
DPPA3 (STELLA) is a germ cell-specific gene involved in epigenetic reprogramming in oocytes
LHX8 is a transcription factor essential for oocyte survival and early folliculogenesis
SOHLH2 is a germ cell-specific transcription factor required for oogenesis and follicle formation
STAG3 is a meiosis-specific cohesin subunit essential for oocyte chromosome segregation
EPCAM marks oocytes in the ovarian context distinguishing them from surrounding somatic cells
H1FOO is an oocyte-specific linker histone variant essential for chromatin remodeling in oocytes
RGS5 is the top canonical pericyte marker regulating G-protein signaling in perivascular cells
TAGLN (transgelin/SM22) is a smooth muscle/pericyte cytoskeletal protein
ACTA2 (alpha-SMA) is a canonical smooth muscle/pericyte contractile protein marker
MYH11 is a smooth muscle myosin heavy chain defining contractile perivascular/smooth muscle cells
NOTCH3 is essential for pericyte/vascular smooth muscle cell specification and maintenance
PDGFRB is the canonical pericyte receptor required for pericyte recruitment to blood vessels
MCAM (CD146) is a pericyte surface marker used for isolation and identification of perivascular cells
PLN (phospholamban) is expressed in smooth muscle/perivascular cells regulating calcium signaling
CSPG4 (NG2) is a canonical pericyte proteoglycan marker on the cell surface
MYL9 is a myosin regulatory light chain expressed in contractile perivascular/smooth muscle cells
DCN (decorin) is a hallmark stromal proteoglycan produced by fibroblasts in connective tissue
PDGFRA is the canonical fibroblast/stromal cell receptor marking mesenchymal populations
COL1A1 encodes fibrillar collagen type I, the major ECM product of stromal fibroblasts
COL1A2 is the alpha-2 chain of type I collagen abundantly produced by stromal cells
FOXL2 is a key ovarian transcription factor expressed in stromal/granulosa lineage cells
TCF21 is a transcription factor marking ovarian stromal/interstitial mesenchymal cells
OGN (osteoglycin) is a small leucine-rich proteoglycan enriched in ovarian stromal fibroblasts
LUM (lumican) is a stromal proteoglycan characteristic of fibroblast populations
FN1 (fibronectin) is a major ECM glycoprotein produced by stromal fibroblasts
CXCL12 (SDF-1) is a chemokine produced by stromal cells supporting niche signaling
CD3D is a component of the T cell receptor complex and definitive T cell lineage marker
CD3E is a core TCR signaling subunit essential for T cell identity
CD8A marks cytotoxic T lymphocytes and is a canonical co-receptor for MHC class I
CCL5 (RANTES) is highly expressed by effector/memory T cells and NK cells
GZMK (granzyme K) marks effector memory CD8+ T cells with cytotoxic function
CD69 is an early T cell activation marker indicating tissue-resident or recently activated T cells
IL7R (CD127) is expressed on naive and memory T cells essential for T cell homeostasis
GZMA (granzyme A) is a serine protease in cytotoxic T cell granules
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule membrane protein expressed in effector T cells and NK cells
LCK is a Src family kinase essential for TCR signaling and T cell development
BCL11B is a transcription factor essential for T cell lineage commitment and identity
RUNX3 is a transcription factor critical for CD8+ T cell differentiation and function
